assignments.label: Assign Email Message Data- Appointment Center

assignments.name: Assign_Email_Message_Data_Appointment_Center_Assuta_Kit_Experts
assignments.label: Assign Email Message Data-Appointment Center- Assuta Kit Experts

assignments.name: Assign_Email_Message_Data_Appointment_Center_Telemedicine
assignments.label: Assign Email Message Data- Appointment Center- Telemedicine

assignments.name: Assign_Email_Message_Data_Assuta_Kit_Experts
assignments.label: Assign Email Message Data- Assuta Kit Experts

assignments.name: Assign_Email_Message_Data_For_Patient_Account
assignments.label: Assign Email Message Data- For Patient (Account)

assignments.name: Assign_Email_Message_Data_Kit_Voucher_Telemedicine_Email
assignments.label: Assign Email Message Data- Kit Voucher Telemedicine Email

assignments.name: Assign_Email_Message_Data_Patient_Assuta_Kit_Experts
assignments.label: Assign Email Message Data-Patient - Assuta Kit Experts

assignments.name: Assign_Email_Message_Data_Patient_Telemedicine
assignments.label: Assign Email Message Data- Patient- Telemedicine

assignments.name: Assign_Email_Message_Data_Telemedicine_And_Experts
assignments.label: Assign Email Message Data- Telemedicine And Experts

assignments.name: Update_Appointment_Sent_Kit_Confirmation_Appointment_Center
assignments.label: Update Appointment- Sent Kit Confirmation- Appointment Center

assignments.name: Update_Appointment_Sent_Kit_Confirmation_Internet_Site
assignments.label: Update Appointment- Sent Kit Confirmation- Internet Site

assignments.name: Update_Appointment_Sent_Kit_Confirmation_Patient
assignments.label: Update Appointment- Sent Kit Confirmation- Patient

rules.name: True_3
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 7) AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 8 AND (9 OR 10) AND 11 AND 12
rules.label: True_3

rules.name: True_2
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7 AND 8 AND (9 OR 10) AND 11 AND 12 AND 13
rules.label: True_2

rules.name: True_0
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7 AND 8 AND 9 AND (10 OR 11) AND 12 AND 13 AND 14 AND (15 OR 16) AND 17
rules.label: True

decisions.name: SMS_for_Patient_Case_for_Cancelled_payment
decisions.label: SMS for Patient (Case) for Cancelled payment

rules.name: True_1
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7 AND 8 AND 9 AND 10 AND 11 AND (12 OR 13) AND (14 OR 15 OR 16) AND 17
rules.label: True_1

rules.name: True
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7 AND 8 AND (10 OR 9) AND (12 OR 13 OR 11) AND 14 AND 15 AND 16 AND 17 AND 18 AND (20 OR 19)
rules.label: True

Flow.description: גרסת פלואו לפרוסס עם אותו Appointments Details - Experts New AM: 24022025- 1836993455- REFACTOR AM: 26052026- 2938047529- INC0062158 - added assignment for kit confirmation after "from internet"decision

formulas.name: SMS_Content
formulas.expression: "שלום " & {!$Record.Patient_Account__r.FirstName} & "." & "לידיעתך, התור טרם נקבע." & " תודה, בית חולים אסותא"

Flow.label: Appointment Details - Experts New

recordUpdates.description:
בפרוסס המקורי הפעולה היתה לעדכן את השדה "סטטוס תשלום קודם" (FormerPaymentStatus) אבל זה לא אפשרי בפלואו כי מדובר בשדה פורמולה שלא ניתן לעדכן בפלואו בצורה ישירה. הערך המקורי שהיה מוזן הוא הפורמולה:
IF( OR (ISPICKVAL (PRIORVALUE ([Appointment__c].PaymentStatus__c ) , "Yet_Done") ,ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE([Appointment__c].PaymentStatus__c ) , "Wrong") ), PRIORVALUE([Appointment__c].PaymentStatus__c ), "")
recordUpdates.name: Update_Appointment
recordUpdates.label: Update Appointment
